description: Accept all tracked changes in a .docx via LibreOffice (headless soffice macro), writing a clean copy with no redlines.
rules: copies the input to a new accepted.docx under record_store, then accepts changes on the copy
drives LibreOffice headless via a one-shot AcceptAllTrackedChanges Basic macro
usage: Set DOCX_FILE (a .docx with tracked changes). Outputs: accepted.docx and accept_changes.log.
limitation: Requires LibreOffice (soffice) on PATH. If soffice is absent the porter records that and exits 0 without producing a cleaned document (degraded).
